name: propkub
description: Open-source monorepo for PropKub.com - Thailand's property marketplace
author: Goff Phatt

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.lint: concurrently "npm run lint -w apps/api" "npm run lint -w apps/web"
scripts.lint:fix: concurrently "npm run lint:fix -w apps/api" "npm run lint:fix -w apps/web"
scripts.format: concurrently "npm run format -w apps/api" "npm run format -w apps/web"
scripts.format:fix: concurrently "npm run format:fix -w apps/api" "npm run format:fix -w apps/web"
